info.title: XShipDownload Action Group

post.summary: Execute an XShipDownload use case and return its rows + metadata.
post.description: Runs one XShipDownload use case. Activity-by-ABA and ABA-rollup take a prepared requestId; zone and criteria-by-period take an encoded criteria token.

useCase.description: The XShipDownload use case to execute.

params.description: Extracted parameters. Which are required depends on the use case (see the operation description for the endpoint mapping).

requestId.description: Prepared activity-download request identifier (detail path segment, for ActivityAba/ActivityAbaRollup).

criteria.description: Encoded activity criteria token (zone / criteria-period path segment).

200.description: Dispatch result for the XShipDownload use case.
